# Supply.Family — License Note

## Scope
This folder captures supply.family's editorial type-marketplace aesthetic for internal, non-commercial, single-user macOS SwiftUI app (Clawmachine) research-reference. It is not redistributed and not used commercially.

## Correction
The operator's brief referenced `supplyfamily.com` which is a parked "Launching Soon" GoDaddy domain. The actual live marketplace is `supply.family` (Krists Darzins / Supply.Family marketplace). All references below are to `supply.family`.

## What's here
- `previews/` — 15 full-resolution product preview JPG/PNGs from supply.family's "free" tag (8 products: badges with lanyards, trucks, billboards, iPhone mockup, carousel AE template, Le Poster). These are promotional images exposed publicly on category pages.
- `mockups/` — ~150 mockup product preview JPGs from supply.family's mockup catalog (Bendito Mockup, Mockup Lab, Orbyt Studio, Layers, Format Mockups, Akoya, Colortime Lab, Ply, Mockup Maison, Darkroom, Square Mockups, Art Directed Mockups, Showcase Mockups, Maryan Ivasyk, Forma, Asketic, 099, A vision, Scene Number Mockup, Layers, PinchesMockups, Studio Yorktown, BYLD, Pixelbuddha). Screen/event/billboard/tote/hat/magazine/business-card/book/signage/poster/coffee-bag/tape/iPad/MacBook/iPhone coverage.
- `type-specimens/` — ~50 font specimen preview JPGs from fonts category (Aloha Font Duo, Oakes Grotesk, Pavilion, Metro Sans, Overprint TM, GC Nordix, Luminaire, Sterling, Golden Goose, Faffin Sans, Reklam, 403 Masonec, Obscura TM, Merida, Normal TM, II Balfron, II Vorkurs, Rotonto, Formative, Arbeit Pro, Kuro, Broke Grotesk, Flapjack, Charmer TM, GC North Sans, TRT Structa Pro, GC Vensca Mono, Boldine, Pen Flow, HN Neue Lifter, BODARK, GC Beluga Mono, GC Neue Rumble, GC Dooze, Casualte, Misero, OverSlept, Takeaways, Casualte Alt, Tobeloved, Stateside, Basehand, KONSUMED, GR GEA, GR Rawdeo, Vida De Historia, GR Fatient, SFC Crest Pier, SFC Southbased, SFC Bierta, SFC South Baron, SFC Solanora, SFC Mackerel, SFC La Pura, SFC Privet, SFC Longyards, SFC Sparta, SFC Lolipa Club, SFC Country Fairway, SFC Palmora, SFC Mehico, SFC Rimowa, SFC Woster Sans, SFC Onthehill, SFC Roundhe, SFC Black Krown, SFC Noble King, SFC Camphard, SFC Standmark, SFC City Champs, SFC Waymark, SFC Bearwood, GC Akihiko, GC Bager, TRT MAKRON, BORDE, TRT MONR BROZ, TRT Fluke, TRT Lancelot, Mirano, GC Grind, Zariantz Book, Nicka, Pinpush, Thyga, GC Kualine, GC Codex, GC Protage, GC Neue Machine, TRT Groza, Atipla ND, GC Sunday Railway, TRT Montero, GC Kroven, GC Regain, TRT Gateral, GC NEOMILAN, TRT Vermolin, GC Milano, GC Chillon, GC Backside Valley, Carnivels, GC Kabuki, SFC Signsmith, Flyer TM, GC Prometheus, GC Palioka, GC Kogan, GC Volkgen, GC Ralinka, GC Once After, GC Under Compas, GC Molecule, GC Begia).
- `type-specimens/html/` — 12 authored HTML type specimen pages plus an index. Each specimen features: big display headline, uppercase + lowercase + figures + punctuation alphabets, editorial paragraph with italic accent, 7-size ladder (12→96pt), and two pairings (with Inter for UI, with JetBrains Mono for data). Covers Aurora Grotesk, Montera Display, Fosca Mono, Ravenna Serif, Pavel Neue, Lumen Script, Brutal Display, Oakes Book, Mono Terminal 82, Caro Condensed, Arcane Round, Stack Editorial. Each specimen uses Google Fonts web-font approximations of the target category — these are not the paid commercial fonts from supply.family.

## Sources
- Primary: https://supply.family (Supply.Family marketplace)
- Image CDN: https://supply.family/wp-content/uploads/YYYY/MM/...
- Every acquired image retains the WordPress slug in its filename for traceability.

## Terms
- Supply.Family's Terms and Conditions prohibit redistribution of the paid font/mockup files. The acquired JPG/PNGs here are promotional preview images the marketplace itself exposes publicly on `/shop/*`, `/product-category/*`, and `/product-tag/*` listings.
- Use strictly inside the single-user Clawmachine app, strictly as aesthetic reference. No commercial redistribution. No redistribution of preview JPGs outside this workspace.
- Authored HTML specimens are original by the operator, using open-source Google Fonts (Inter, Playfair Display, JetBrains Mono, EB Garamond, etc). Those are OFL-licensed; the authored layout is not.

## If scope changes
Purchase individual font/mockup licenses from supply.family creators (typically $16–40/item) to obtain the actual OTF/TTF/PSD source files and commercial license, or remove the acquired previews and rely only on the authored HTML specimens.
